meta.title: Companies worth following
meta.note: Auto-tracked: the companies most active in the curated event log, each with its latest dated development. Machine-written from gated facts only; no hand-written copy.

companies.name: Apollo
companies.signal: The asset manager is in talks to finance energy and transport projects in Mexico, a sign of continued private capital interest despite trade and policy uncertainty.

companies.name: Honda
companies.signal: Honda will pull the Prologue EV from the US market and shift toward hybrids, citing weak electric vehicle demand, a setback for Mexico's EV manufacturing push.

companies.name: Grupo México
companies.signal: Grupo México Transportes will lose about 1.5 million dollars a year in revenue after the Tacoma pickup's production changes, showing how shifting auto supply chains ripple into rail freight.
